title: SaaSSubscription
description: Schema for a SaaS application subscription managed within the Sastrify platform

id.description: Unique identifier for the subscription record in Sastrify

vendorName.description: Name of the SaaS vendor or publisher

category.description: Functional category of the SaaS tool

annualCost.description: Annual cost of the subscription in the contract currency

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the annual cost

licenseCount.description: Total number of licenses or seats in the current contract

activeUsers.description: Number of users active in the past 30 days

utilizationRate.description: Percentage of provisioned licenses actively used (activeUsers / licenseCount)

contractStartDate.description: Start date of the current contract term

autoRenew.description: Whether the contract auto-renews at expiration

contractOwner.description: Name or email of the internal owner responsible for this subscription

department.description: Primary business department using this tool

benchmarkData.description: Market pricing benchmark for this tool category

medianPricePerSeat.description: Median market price per seat per year for this tool category

organizationPricePerSeat.description: Current price per seat per year paid by the organization

savingsOpportunity.description: Estimated annual savings if price is brought to benchmark

percentile.description: Price percentile (e.g., 75 means paying more than 75% of similar companies)

discoverySource.description: How the subscription was discovered by Sastrify

status.description: Current status of the subscription in Sastrify
